settings.pf_4fca8cd8_value:
Pass Down Savings: Competitive pricing boosts your profit margins, with 20% off local pickup orders and 10% off dropshipping orders.

Innovative Products: Expanding range of energy-efficient smart AC solutions.

Superior Support: Customer service that exceeds industry standards.

Trusted Brand: DELLA is recognized for reliability and affordability.
settings.pf_41e66309_value: Della provides 1-year basic and 6-month extended warranties (with registration within 100 days) for Window ACs, Portable ACs, and Tower Fans. Mini Split units feature a lifetime parts warranty for free defect replacements, ensuring long-term reliability for your customers.
settings.pf_566e1b77_value: DELLA is committed to growing in the wholesale and distribution market, offering partners high-quality, affordable products. By partnering with us, you’ll join a brand focused on expanding its product line and enhancing technology.
settings.pf_1efd2c51_value: DELLA ensures fast, reliable delivery with distribution centers in Los Angeles, Dallas, and Summerville. Each warehouse holds over $10 million in inventory, enabling same-day processing, two-day shipping, and flexible LTL options.
settings.pf_d5b4dfdd_value:
Our local pickup locations are available at the following addresses:
19301 E Walnut Dr N, City of Industry, CA 91748
10710 Bonnie View Rd, Dallas, TX 75241
631 Omni Industrial Blvd, Summerville, SC 29483
settings.pf_b383edc4_value: Della provides 20% off Local Pickup Orders and 10% off Dropshipping Orders, ensuring both flexibility and cost savings for your business. These options are designed to help streamline operations and boost profitability.
settings.pf_8bb322f0_value: With Della, you’re never alone. Contact our in-house technicians at (800) 863-4143, Mon-Fri (PST), or rely on our 24/7 live chat for round-the-clock assistance. We’re here to keep your business running smoothly.
settings.pf_61e86537_value: With consistent sales growth and recognition as an Amazon #1 Best-Seller, DELLA delivers trusted, innovative solutions. Upcoming central air systems will further expand our offerings and elevate home comfort.
settings.pf_2c8d7b30_value: Della is the No.1 mini-split brand on Amazon (2022-2023), offering reliable, efficient, and quiet products. Partnering with us means aligning with a proven market leader that customers trust.
settings.pf_d1c9ffb2_value: Yes, you can contact our customer support team to update your business information after approval. For further assistance, reach us at (800) 863-4143 or via our 24/7 live chat.
settings.pf_cbd23054_value: Simply fill out the application form on our Wholesalers Program page and submit the required documents, including your seller certificate and reseller permit.
settings.pf_8ff4a95f_value: Once you submit your application, our team will review it promptly. We will contact you via phone or email with the next steps after approval.
settings.pf_dc778d45_value: DELLA is dedicated to delivering affordable, energy-efficient cooling solutions with modern tech for everyone’s ultimate home comfort.
settings.pf_3f5a0518_value: Enjoy the assurance of a lifetime parts warranty on all mini-splits, ensuring long-term reliability and worry-free ownership.
settings.pf_b9015584_value: Dedicated and trained staff are available around the clock, with live chat support to assist whenever needed.

settings.pf_ded0763a_value: Please complete your wholesale registration at our new site: dellahvac.com. Click below to get started.
